dt-example.title: Ordering buttons
dt-example.info:
Buttons has two built in button types which can be used to control ordering in the table:
* `-button colOrder` - similar to its counterpart for column visibility (`-button colvis`) this button will show a dropdown of selected columns (all by default), allowing the end user to select what order they want to be applied to the table. * `-button columnOrder` - this button will control a single column and order the table by that column when activated. The collection button is made up of these button types.
This example demonstrates both button types - the first is a dropdown allowing ordering on any column, while the second two buttons are specific to the _Position_ and _Office_ columns.
